scripts.build: pnpm run build:native-ext && pnpm run copy:ext && pnpm run build:ts
scripts.test: pnpm -C ../sync/protocol run build && pnpm -C ../sync/material/sqlite run build && pnpm run build && vitest run
scripts.benchmark:ops: pnpm -C ../sync/protocol run build && pnpm -C ../sync/material/sqlite run build && pnpm run build && tsx ./scripts/bench.ts
scripts.benchmark:hot-write: pnpm -C ../treecrdt-benchmark run build && pnpm run build && tsx ./scripts/bench-hot-writes.ts
scripts.benchmark:note-paths: pnpm -C ../treecrdt-benchmark run build && pnpm run build && tsx ./scripts/bench-note-paths.ts
scripts.benchmark:sync: pnpm -C ../treecrdt-benchmark run build && pnpm -C ../sync/protocol run build && pnpm -C ../sync/material/sqlite run build && pnpm -C ../treecrdt-postgres-napi run build && pnpm -C ../sync/server/postgres-node run build && pnpm run build && tsx ./scripts/bench-sync.ts
scripts.benchmark: pnpm run benchmark:ops && pnpm run benchmark:note-paths && pnpm run benchmark:sync
